{"code":"(def unresolved-issues (filter #(= (:status %) "unresolved") (sentry_issues)))

(def highest-count-issue (apply max-key :count unresolved-issues))

(def email-body (str "Top error: " (:title highest-count-issue)))

(insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Top error" :body email-body})"}
